body: leave by 6:15 for band practice, tuesday 7pm at travis's
wake forest kitchen today, be there 6:30. bring your nail gun
on it. see you there
practice moved to thursday this week, wes has a thing tues
works. same time?
can someone grab an extra DI box before thursday, mine's dying
i've got a spare, i'll bring it
Sunday lunch at the house, your dad's smoking a brisket. leave by 11 honey
wouldn't miss brisket. i'll be there
leave by 11 sunday lunch in garner
rain today, wake forest is off. head to the apex deck instead
10-4, deck it is
netflix logged me out again lol did you change the password
nope it's your login, i just mooch off it
trash night, it's your turn. also band site cert renews friday i'll handle it
got the trash. thanks for handling the site
rent's due the 15th, venmo whenever works. thanks Jordan
sending it over today
setlist for the trophy gig, want to add cover of cover me up?
yes. isbell always lands. i'll work out the bass line
you free saturday, could use a hand replacing a water heater in garner
yeah i'm around. text me the time
bringing home ribs from the restaurant, they're comping the tray
you're a legend. leaving room in the fridge
apex deck framing wraps this week. good work out there
load-in for trophy is 6, doors 8. don't be late with the amp
leave by 11 for sunday lunch with your dad in garner (10/01)
rent due the 15th, venmo ray $650 (10/03)
transfer $250 to the tools fund and $200 to savings today (1st) (10/05)
last friday of the month, check email for bills (10/07)
